release_notes:
🚀 V18.0 Major Updates:

• Energy Bill Calculator: Comprehensive support for Domestic, Commercial, Industrial, and STW (TOD & Whole-day) consumers. Input units and contractual load for exact billing based on the latest 2025-26 tariff rates. Includes a specialized module to calculate tariff benefits for consumers impacted by abrupt billing cycles.

• Theft Assessment Calculator: Instantly generate Provisional and Final assessments for any category. Enter load and category for exact penal figures and an automated check if the final assessment is within the 25% reduction limit.

• Tariff Manager: Centralized hub to view and manage active rate charts. Update tariff rates directly in the app to ensure calculations remain 100% accurate as regulatory charts evolve.
